mapper.sql: w.id, w.title, w.crop_id, w.pest_id, w.risk_level, w.warning_type, w.warning_date, w.rule_id, w.delete_flag, w.gmt_create, w.gmt_modified
w.id, w.title, w.crop_id, c.name AS crop_name, w.pest_id, p.name AS pest_name, w.risk_level, w.warning_type, w.warning_date
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM warning w INNER JOIN crop c ON w.crop_id = c.id INNER JOIN pest p ON w.pest_id = p.id WHERE

SELECT w.id, w.title, w.crop_id, c.name AS crop_name, w.pest_id, p.name AS pest_name, w.risk_level, w.warning_type, w.warning_date, w.rule_id, pr.suggestion, w.gmt_create FROM warning w INNER JOIN crop c ON w.crop_id = c.id INNER JOIN pest p ON w.pest_id = p.id INNER JOIN prewarning_rules pr ON w.rule_id = pr.id WHERE w.id = #{id} AND w.delete_flag = 0 AND c.delete_flag = 0 AND p.delete_flag = 0 AND pr.delete_flag = 0

SELECT
FROM warning w INNER JOIN crop c ON w.crop_id = c.id INNER JOIN pest p ON w.pest_id = p.id WHERE w.delete_flag = 0 AND c.delete_flag = 0 AND p.delete_flag = 0 AND w.warning_type = 'TODAY' AND w.warning_date = #{warningDate} ORDER BY CASE w.risk_level WHEN '高' THEN 1 WHEN '中' THEN 2 WHEN '低' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, w.id DESC

SELECT
FROM warning w INNER JOIN crop c ON w.crop_id = c.id INNER JOIN pest p ON w.pest_id = p.id WHERE w.delete_flag = 0 AND c.delete_flag = 0 AND p.delete_flag = 0 AND w.warning_type = 'FORECAST' AND w.warning_date >= #{startDate} AND w.warning_date <= #{endDate} ORDER BY w.warning_date ASC, CASE w.risk_level WHEN '高' THEN 1 WHEN '中' THEN 2 WHEN '低' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, w.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE warning SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0

UPDATE warning SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE delete_flag = 0 AND id IN
#{warningId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warning ( title, crop_id, pest_id, risk_level, warning_type, warning_date, rule_id, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{cropId}, #{pestId}, #{riskLevel}, #{warningType}, #{warningDate}, #{ruleId}, #{deleteFlag} )
mapper.update: UPDATE warning SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE delete_flag = 0 AND warning_type = 'TODAY' AND warning_date = #{warningDate}
